notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: James Outman singles on a ground ball to right fielder Braden Montgomery, deflected by second baseman Sam Antonacci. Spencer Torkelson scores. James Outman to 2nd. James Outman advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by right fielder Braden Montgomery.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Missed catch error by first baseman Spencer Torkelson on the pickoff attempt. Braden Montgomery to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: James Outman singles on a ground ball to right fielder Braden Montgomery, deflected by second baseman Sam Antonacci. Spencer Torkelson scores. James Outman to 2nd. James Outman advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by right fielder Braden Montgomery.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: James Outman singles on a ground ball to right fielder Braden Montgomery, deflected by second baseman Sam Antonacci. Spencer Torkelson scores. James Outman to 2nd. James Outman advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by right fielder Braden Montgomery.

notableEvents.label: Chase Meidroth pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Chase Meidroth grounds out, shortstop Zach McKinstry to first baseman Spencer Torkelson.

notableEvents.label: Edgar Quero pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Edgar Quero pops out to second baseman Hao-Yu Lee.

notableEvents.label: Chase Meidroth pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Chase Meidroth singles on a soft bunt ground ball to third baseman Kevin McGonigle.

notableEvents.label: Junior Perez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jake Rogers challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Junior Perez walks.
